title: Xaeros playerposition
description: Xaero 小地图/世界地图附加mod，在地图中显示玩家具体位置，方便寻找 Xaero minimap/World map additional mod, showing the player's specific location in the map, easy to find
body:
**Xaero's Player Position** 是一个基于Xaero的小地图和 Xaero的世界地图开发用于 Minecraft 的客户端实用模组。  
功能是显示玩家当前坐标（X/Y/Z）并提供便捷的位置共享文本，方便联机时快速集合与导航。

### 主要功能
- 实时显示当前坐标
- 一键复制/发送位置文本（用于聊天或队伍沟通）
- 支持主世界、下界、末地坐标显示

### 适用场景
- 多人联机集合
- 据点、矿洞、传送门定位
- 日常探索中的位置记录

### 使用方法
由于bug无法解决，需要按一下Tab键才能出现玩家头像。大地图的显示会出现多个重复的头像，没有白边的头像是玩家目前的位置，存在白边的是异常显示，会存在一些视觉上的问题

### 下载前须知
- 这是客户端功能模组，不提供作弊功能，不绕过服务器限制
- 需要安装并启用对应加载器与前置依赖（见“依赖”）

### 依赖
- Minecraft
- [Xaero的小地图](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)
- [Xaero的世界地图](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)

---
Xaero's Player Position is a client-side utility mod for Minecraft, developed based on Xaero's Minimap and Xaero's World Map.  
It shows your current coordinates (X/Y/Z) and provides quick position-sharing text for fast gathering and navigation in multiplayer.

### Features
- Real-time current coordinate display
- One-click copy/send location text (for chat or team communication)
- Coordinate display support for Overworld, Nether, and End

### Instructions for Use
Due to an unresolved bug, player avatars will only show up after pressing the Tab key. Multiple duplicate avatars may appear on the world map: avatars without white borders indicate the player's actual location, whereas those with white borders are faulty renderings that result in visual artifacts.

### Application Scenarios
- Multiplayer party gathering
- Base, mine, and portal positioning
- Location recording during daily exploration

### Pre-Download Notice
- This is a client-only functional mod with no cheats or hacks and does not bypass server restrictions
- Requires a compatible mod loader and the mandatory dependencies listed below

### Dependencies
- Minecraft
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)
- [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)
